criteria_audit.gap: Plans and workplaces grids list rows and wire delete via Supabase (with onboarding_data fallback), but AC-2 requires edit/delete card actions — no edit buttons, no updateAdminPlan/updateAdminWorkplace, and missing IR action markers (ai_RNbBHYab/ai_RNbBHYac/ai_RNbBHYae, ai_RNbBHYat/ai_RNbBHYau/ai_RNbBHYaw). Analytics stat cards and read-only aggregates are implemented.

functional_audit.check: Plans, workplaces, and analytics sub-tabs render real toolbars/grids/stats under admin-sub-contents (not placeholder stubs)
Plans grid loads subscriptionplan rows via Supabase subscription_plan table with static/onboarding fallback
Workplaces grid loads workplace rows via Supabase workplace table with onboarding fallback
Add-plan popup submit creates a plan record (table insert or onboarding_data persistence)
Add-workplace popup submit creates a workplace record (table insert or onboarding_data persistence)
Plan delete removes non-static custom plans and refreshes grid
Workplace delete removes rows and refreshes grid
Analytics tab fetches read-only aggregates from profiles and journal_entries
Plans/workplaces/analytics sub-tab buttons toggle visibility without breaking paths/resources state
Plan card edit action is present and updates an existing plan (AC-2 edit/delete parity)
Workplace card edit action is present and updates an existing workplace (AC-2 edit/delete parity)

ui_evidence.notes: Plans sub-tab button in SettingsAdminShell admin-sub-tab-bar
AdminPlansTab root with toolbar and grid
AdminWorkplacesTab root with toolbar and grid
AdminAnalyticsTab root with notice and stat grid
Decompose ui_ref does not match IR: resolver maps ai_RNbBHYaA to admin-resource-tags-row, not plan edit. Plan edit is ai_RNbBHYac; neither is mounted on plan cards.

gaps: AC-2 edit card actions missing on plans and workplaces grids (no edit buttons, no update API, no card-action group markers)
Plan toolbar title lacks ai_RNbBHYaR marker (h3 uses copy without data-bubble-id)
Workplace grid cards lack ai_RNbBHYao template and nested name/email markers (ai_RNbBHYar, ai_RNbBHYas)
Delete buttons on plan/workplace cards lack IR bubble ids ai_RNbBHYae and ai_RNbBHYaw
Decompose ui_refs includes ai_RNbBHYaA but IR entity is admin-resource-tags-row; correct plan edit btn is ai_RNbBHYac

critiques.finding: AC-2 names edit/delete card actions; implementation delivers delete-only on plans and workplaces, below even SET-09 paths tab which stubs edit with a Pencil button and bubble id.
critiques.alternative: Add ai_RNbBHYab/ai_RNbBHYac edit buttons reusing AddPlanPopup/AddWorkplacePopup in edit mode with updateAdminPlan/updateAdminWorkplace APIs mirroring create/delete fallback pattern.

critiques.finding: Nested plan/workplace card IR nodes (actions row, delete btn, workplace card template, plans title ai_RNbBHYaR) are not marked with data-bubble-id despite routes.ts constants existing for sibling entities.
critiques.alternative: Extend routes.ts with ai_RNbBHYaR, ai_RNbBHYab, ai_RNbBHYac, ai_RNbBHYae, ai_RNbBHYao, ai_RNbBHYar, ai_RNbBHYas, ai_RNbBHYat, ai_RNbBHYau, ai_RNbBHYaw and mount on card templates matching AdminPathsTab action-row pattern.

critiques.finding: createAdminPlan/createAdminWorkplace fall back to profiles.onboarding_data JSON blobs when tables are absent — functional for demo but not shared admin persistence across users.
critiques.alternative: Document demo fallback explicitly in UI notice or gate admin CRUD behind subscription_plan/workplace table availability; align table name with Bubble subscriptionplan user type when migrations land.

critiques.finding: Analytics stat labels use prototype copy ('Journal entries', 'Pro subscribers') rather than verifying Bubble static text for ai_RNbBHYbH/ai_RNbBHYbN; notice text is rewritten vs IR.
critiques.alternative: Extract static strings from drsam-99657.bubble source_path for ai_RNbBHYbB and stat label nodes; match IR copy exactly.
